title: dioscorea psilostachya
intro: Dioscorea psilostachya, also known as Chinese yam or shanyao, is a species of yam that belongs to the Dioscoreaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its diosgenin content, which is used to create hormone replacement therapy. The health benefits of Dioscorea psilostachya include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and osteoporosis. Dioscorea psilostachya can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and is often consumed as a supplement in traditional Chinese medicine.
